title: polycarena rangei
intro: Polycarena rangei, also known as the "Ammobium," is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the Scrophulariaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polycarena rangei include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
